Name: Chadwick School
Tagline: An independent K–12 school in Palos Verdes, California, developing global citizens through academic excellence and a commitment to character.
About: Chadwick is steeped in more than 90 years of history and tradition that began with the extraordinary vision of one woman: Margaret Lee Chadwick. From her very first home school in 1935, to her entrepreneurial efforts to secure the first acres of land on the Palos Verdes Peninsula, to today’s campuses in Palos Verdes, California, and Songdo, South Korea, Margaret Chadwick was a pioneer.
Philosophy: -12 yearly outdoor education trips to build resilience and confidence Raise your hand if you’ve ever been so engaged in a class that time flew by and you wanted to stick around after just to keep the conversation going. At Chadwick, that’s not the exception — it’s the norm.
Outcomes: Chadwick School graduates consistently gain admission to prestigious universities such as Stanford, Harvard, and UCLA. The school is recognized for producing National Merit Scholars and students who excel in academic competitions and arts programs.
Admissions: Prospective students must submit an online application, including transcripts and teacher recommendations, by the January deadline. Admissions decisions are based on academic performance, entrance exams, and interviews, with notifications typically sent in March.
Quote: Chadwick’s educational programs are intentionally designed to maximize hands-on, real-world learning for our students. Would you like to begin your pursuit of goodness and greatness?

Performance.Student Wellbeing: How do you make learning joyful? That’s not a rhetorical question — we actually know the answer!
Performance.Academic Integration: Math is a daily journey of exploration, reasoning and meaningful connection. Through the research-based "Math in Focus" curriculum, students experience a purposeful progression from hands-on, concrete experiences, to visual models and ultimately to abstract representations.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Core academic subjects are core for a reason, but whole-child development means going further. Students in Village School engage in a variety of specialist subjects multiple times a week, including STEM, music, art, Spanish, library and physical education.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Chadwick School employs experienced educators, many holding advanced degrees and certifications in their fields, ensuring high-quality instruction. Faculty members are often specialists in their subjects, bringing real-world expertise to the classroom.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Chadwick School graduates frequently attend top-tier universities, including Ivy League institutions and prestigious California schools. Alumni have achieved success in diverse fields, from academia to the arts, reflecting the school's comprehensive education.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Chadwick School utilizes regular progress reports and parent-teacher conferences to ensure transparent communication about student development. The school employs a robust assessment system to track academic and personal growth effectively.
